grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive right and license to develop and operate a Center under the Marks and System at the approved location only (FA 1.1)
grant_and_term.renewal: Two 5-year renewal terms. Written notice 9-12 months before expiration (FA 2.2)
renewal_conditions: Not in default of FA or any other agreement with franchisor or landlord (2.2(i))
All obligations to franchisor, vendors, and landlord satisfied (2.2(ii))
Execute then-current FA which may have materially different terms including different royalty rates; no additional IFF (2.2(iii))
Pay renewal fee of $5,000 (subject to CPI adjustment) (2.2(iv))
Reimage, renovate, refurbish center to then-current standards (2.2(vi))
Evidence of right to remain in possession of premises (2.2(viii))
Franchisor has determined it will continue to offer franchises in franchisee's territory (2.2(ix))

fees_and_payments.iff: $50,000 (or as shown in Schedule A). Fully earned on execution. Nonrefundable. (FA 4.1)
fees_and_payments.royalty: 6% of Gross Revenues, monthly by 5th, via EFT (FA 4.2)
fees_and_payments.technology_fee: $100/month, subject to change on 30 days notice (FA 4.5)
fees_and_payments.annual_increase: Fixed fees may increase once per year per CPI-U (FA 4.9)
fees_and_payments.payment_method: ACH/EFT mandatory. Cannot close bank account without notice and substitute (FA 4.10)
fees_and_payments.interest: Up to 1.5% per month (18% per annum) on late payments (FA 4.11)
fees_and_payments.payment_application: Franchisor determines order of application; franchisee may not designate (FA 4.12)
fees_and_payments.no_right_to_offset: Franchisee may not withhold payments as offset against alleged franchisor nonperformance (FA 19.5)

site_selection_and_construction.site_deadline: 60 days from FA date to identify and submit for approval (FA 5.2)
site_selection_and_construction.franchisor_review: 15 days from receipt of all information (FA 5.2)
site_selection_and_construction.lease_deadline: 60 days after signing FA. Failure = grounds for immediate termination and loss of IFF (FA 5.3)
lease_requirements: Franchisor right to cure franchisee's default
Franchisor right to assume lease on default
Landlord must notify franchisor of default
Franchisor right to enter premises without interference
site_selection_and_construction.opening_deadline: 120 days from FA execution or franchisor may terminate (FA 5.5)
site_selection_and_construction.no_opening_without_certification: Cannot open until franchisor certifies full compliance (FA 5.5)

training_obligations.initial: Minimum 5 days. Must complete to franchisor's satisfaction. Failure to complete after re-enrollment = termination right (FA 5.1)
training_obligations.thera_wellness: Must complete basic THERA WELLNESS virtual training (FA 5.1)
training_obligations.additional: Mandatory; at franchisor's discretion; cost includes daily/hourly fee + expenses (FA 5.1)

non_curable: Felony conviction or crime of moral turpitude (16.2(x))
Failure to open for 5 consecutive days (16.2(xi))
2+ default notices in 12 months regardless of cure (16.2(xv))
curable_10_days: Lease default or loss of possession (16.3(i))
Failure to complete training to satisfaction (16.3(ii))
Any other breach not listed in 16.2 (16.3(v))
termination_triggers.cross_default: Default under one agreement may result in termination of all (stated in Item 17 table)

conditions: Purchaser has satisfactory credit, character, qualifications (15.4(i))
Terms and purchase price satisfactory to franchisor (15.4(ii))
All monetary obligations paid in full (15.4(iii))
Transfer fee = 50% of then-current IFF + reimbursement of franchisor expenses (15.4(vii))

noncompete_scope.during_term: No competing business anywhere in U.S. Applies to franchisee, all equity holders, guarantor, spouses, children (18.5(i))
noncompete_scope.post_term: 2 years within territory or 50 miles of center. Same parties. (18.5(ii))
noncompete_scope.non_solicitation: 2 years post-term on clients and employees (18.5(iii))
noncompete_scope.severability: Court directed to modify to minimum extent to make enforceable (18.8(ii))
noncompete_scope.entity_principals: All equity holders must execute Schedule E covenants (18.9)

guaranty_scope.who: All owners of equity in the franchisee entity
guaranty_scope.scope: Personal guaranty of all franchisee obligations under FA (Schedule D)

liquidated_damages.formula: Average monthly royalty for prior 12 months x 24 months (or remaining term if shorter)
liquidated_damages.trigger: Termination by franchisor for default, or unauthorized termination by franchisee

dispute_resolution.mediation: Required first step. In Chicago, IL. Non-binding. JAMS. Costs shared equally. (19.1)
dispute_resolution.arbitration: Binding. Chicago, IL. JAMS rules. Individual only — no class actions. Judgment may be entered in IL or franchisee's state. (19.2)
arbitrator_limitations: Cannot stay effectiveness of any award pending FA termination
Cannot assess punitive or exemplary damages
Cannot extend, modify, or suspend FA terms
dispute_resolution.exceptions: Declaratory/equitable relief, injunctions, real property actions not subject to mediation/arbitration
dispute_resolution.prior_notice: Must notify within 30 days of discovering breach as condition precedent to damages action (19.3)
dispute_resolution.waiver_of_punitive_damages: Franchisee waives all punitive, exemplary, incidental, indirect, special, consequential damages (19.7)
dispute_resolution.venue: Cook County, IL or U.S. District Court where franchisor HQ is located (19.6)

insurance_requirements.additional_insured: Franchisor and affiliates named on all policies
insurance_requirements.notice: 30 days prior written notice of cancellation/alteration
insurance_requirements.franchisor_right_to_procure: If franchisee fails to maintain, franchisor may procure and charge (13.3)

indemnification.scope: Full indemnification of franchisor and affiliates from all claims, damages (actual, consequential), costs, fees (22.1-22.2)
indemnification.no_mitigation_required: Indemnified party need not seek recovery from insurer or mitigate losses (22.2)

force_majeure.note: Force majeure provision exists in FA Article 28

distinctive_clauses.clause: Selling sound-wave equipment at wholesale/retail is grounds for non-curable termination
distinctive_clauses.note: Unique to this system — prevents franchisee from reselling the therapy equipment independently

distinctive_clauses.clause: Representing medical services/diagnosis/treatment is grounds for non-curable termination
distinctive_clauses.note: Reflects the FDA regulatory constraints on General Wellness Products

distinctive_clauses.clause: Failure to open for 5 consecutive days is non-curable termination
distinctive_clauses.note: Very short threshold for deemed abandonment

distinctive_clauses.clause: Franchisor determines order of payment application; franchisee cannot designate
distinctive_clauses.note: Franchisor controls which obligations get paid first from any payment

distinctive_clauses.clause: Illinois fee deferral imposed by Attorney General
distinctive_clauses.note: IFF deferred until franchisor meets initial obligations and franchisee opens. Imposed due to financial condition.
